parsed.name: cubrid-mysql-delete-sequential
parsed.description: DELETE by primary key. Each iteration re-seeds and deletes from a 1K-row table. Measures delete throughput for CUBRID (pycubrid) vs MySQL (PyMySQL). Replicates cubrid-benchmark Tier 1: bench_delete_1k_sequential.

queries: CREATE TABLE bench_delete (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, amount INT NOT NULL)
